prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年浙江省综合类最低位次分别为 14022→14380→15737→15554→16817，整体呈持续后移趋势，近 4 年累计后移约 2795 名；2025 年基准位次约 16817 名，较 2024 年进一步后移 1263 名，下行趋势明显；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划 2021 年 73 人、2022 年 77 人、2023 年 81 人、2024 年 74 人、2025 年 79 人；2026 年计划 102 人，较 2025 年扩招 23 人（增幅约 29.1%），扩招幅度较大，理论上使录取位次数字增大、竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国海洋大学为 985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名 2021 年第 56 名、2022 年第 57 名、2023 年第 62 名、2024 年第 57 名、2025 年第 56 名、2026 年第 51 名，排名近年稳中有升，2026 年进入前 55 名，学校综合实力和声誉持续向好；2023 年高考周期内该校曾因小语种类专业位次下降 6211 位被列为低关注投档异常信号，但该事件已过时且影响有限；2026 年声誉文件中无该校负面记录；抖音热度总排名第 21 位（较热），综合热度约 243 万，短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，对报考关注度有一定正面拉动；第五轮学科评估中，水产 A+、海洋科学 A+、生物学 A-、食品科学与工程 A-，共 4 个 A- 及以上学科，海洋和水产领域为全国顶尖水平，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026 年专业热度显示计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，法学、汉语言等文科专业偏热推荐，生化环材、新闻传播等明显劝退；该校招生专业以海洋、水 产、食品、生物、环境等为主，部分属于劝退方向，但海洋科学 A+ 学科具有独特优势；浙江省 2026 年普通高考考生总数约 40 万人，较 2025 年 29.1 万人大幅增加约 10.9 万人（增幅约 37.6%），竞争基数显著扩大；该校位于山东省青岛市，在浙江省非本省招生，无本地倾斜优势；2021–2025 年浙江省招生人数在 73–81 人之间波动，2026 年扩至 102 人，扩招幅度明显，但浙江省考生增幅更大，供需关系总体偏紧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年大幅扩招（+29.1%）与浙江省考生数大幅增加（+37.6%）的对冲效应、软科排名上升至第 51 位的正面信号、抖音较热曝光度，以及海洋科学 A+ 学科对特定考生的吸引力，预计 2026 年最低录取位次在 2025 年基准 16817 名基础上因扩招而数字增大，但考生增幅更大且学校层次提升，位次数字不会过度后移；预测最低位次约 19604 名，区间 19104–20104 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学（崂山校区）
- 计算机类（西海岸校区）
- 智能科学与技术（AI拔尖人才实验班）（西海岸校区）
- 海洋科学（蓝梦拔尖人才实验班）（崂山校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 海洋科学（崂山校区）
- 电子信息类（西海岸校区）
- 自动化（西海岸校区）
- 数学类（崂山校区）
- 生物科学类（鱼山校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 食品科学与工程类（西海岸校区）
- 水产养殖学（鱼山校区）
- 海洋渔业科学与技术（鱼山校区）
- 港口航道与海岸工程（西海岸校区）
- 材料类（西海岸校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 19104–20104 名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（海洋科学、电子信息类、自动化等），一档专业（法学、计算机类、拔尖班）作为冲刺，三档专业（食品、水产、港口航道等）作为保底。海 洋科学 A+ 和水产 A+ 为该校独有优势学科，对海洋领域感兴趣的考生可重点考虑。位次明显优于区间下限时可大胆冲刺一档热门专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Zhejiang Province were 14022→14380→15737→15554→16817, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2795 places in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 16817, further shifting back by 1263 places compared to 2024, indicating a clear downward trend; the enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Zhejiang Province was 73 in 2021, 77 in 2022, 81 in 2023, 74 in 2024, and 79 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 102, an increase of 23 students (about 29.1%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, theoretically increasing the admission ranking number and alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ocean University of China is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 56th in 2021, 57th in 2022, 62nd in 2023, 57th in 2024, 56th in 2025, and 51st in 2026, showing a stable upward trend in recent years, entering the top 55 in 2026, with continuously improving comprehensive strength and reputation; during the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, the university experienced a ranking drop of 6211 places in minor language majors, which was flagged as a low-attention admission anomaly signal, but this event is outdated and has limited impact; there are no negative records of the university in the 2026 reputation document; Douyin heat total ranking is 21st (relatively hot), with comprehensive heat of about 2.43 million, indicating moderate to high exposure on short video platforms, positively influencing application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Aquaculture A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-, totaling 4 disciplines at A- or above, with marine and aquaculture fields at the national top level, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity shows that engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, while liberal arts majors like Law and Chinese Language are moderately recommended; majors like Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials, and Journalism/Communication are clearly discouraged; the university's enrollment majors are mainly in marine, aquaculture, food, biology, and environment, some of which fall into discouraged directions, but Marine Science A+ has unique advantages; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Zhejiang Province in 2026 is about 400,000, a significant increase of about 109,000 (about 37.6%) compared to 291,000 in 2025, greatly expanding the competition base; the university is located in Qingdao, Shandong Province, and is not a local enrollment in Zhejiang Province, with no local preference advantage; from 2021 to 2025, the number of enrolled students in Zhejiang Province fluctuated between 73 and 81, expanding to 102 in 2026, a significant expansion, but the increase in Zhejiang candidates is even larger, resulting in a generally tight supply-demand relationship.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the offsetting effect of the significant expansion in 2026 (+29.1%) and the large increase in Zhejiang candidates (+37.6%), the positive signal of the Soft Science ranking rising to 51st, the relatively hot Douyin exposure, and the attraction of Marine Science A+ to specific candidates, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will increase numerically due to the expansion based on the 2025 baseline of 16817, but the larger increase in candidates and the improved school level will prevent the ranking from shifting too far back; the predicted minimum ranking is about 19604, with a range of 19104–20104.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Law (Laoshan Campus)
- Computer Science (West Coast Campus)
- Intelligent Science and Technology (AI Top Talent Experimental Class) (West Coast Campus)
- Marine Science (Lanmeng Top Talent Experimental Class) (Laoshan Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Marine Science (Laoshan Campus)
- Electronic Information (West Coast Campus)
- Automation (West Coast Campus)
- Mathematics (Laoshan Campus)
- Biological Sciences (Yushan Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Food Science and Engineering (West Coast Campus)
- Aquaculture (Yushan Campus)
- Marine Fisheries Science and Technology (Yushan Campus)
- Port, Waterway and Coastal Engineering (West Coast Campus)
- Materials (West Coast Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 19104–20104, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Marine Science, Electronic Information, Automation, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Law, Computer Science, Top Talent Classes) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Food, Aquaculture, Port Waterway, etc.) as a safety net. Marine Science A+ and Aquaculture A+ are the university's unique advantageous disciplines, and candidates interested in the marine field can consider them as a priority. When the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can boldly sprint for Tier 1 popular majors.
